Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[(defName="DNX_DroneCommandConsole" or defName="DNX_HAD09GhoulBomberBay" or defName="DNX_ExperimentalDroneDock" or defName="DNX_LogisticsDroneDock") and not(designationCategory)]

/Defs/ThingDef[(defName="DNX_AimingExtensionArray" or defName="DNX_DirectionalShieldGenerator" or defName="DNX_FireControlConsole" or defName="DNX_MaintenanceArm" or defName="DNX_TacticalMarkerTower" or defName="DNX_TriEyeTargetingArray")]/designationCategory

/Defs/ThingDef[(defName="DNX_Turret_AvengerTwinCannon" or defName="DNX_Turret_Boxer35mmAA" or defName="DNX_Turret_ConvergenceDeathRay" or defName="DNX_Turret_FlatheadRocketTurret" or defName="DNX_Turret_GeminiGatling" or defName="DNX_Turret_GyrfalconM20mmComposite" or defName="DNX_Turret_Hammer120mm" or defName="DNX_HunterKillerSupportSystem" or defName="DNX_Turret_LaserChargeEmitter" or defName="DNX_Turret_LightMachineGun" or defName="DNX_Turret_LightSniper" or defName="DNX_Turret_LittleTrainRGPrototype" or defName="DNX_SustainedLaserEmitter" or defName="DNX_Turret_LongbowM301RocketArtillery" or defName="DNX_Turret_OpenerMLSSixteen" or defName="DNX_Turret_Orchestra40mmChainCannon" or defName="DNX_PrismLaserPointDefenseSystem" or defName="DNX_Turret_SentinelHMGFour" or defName="DNX_Turret_ShieldedSMG" or defName="DNX_Turret_ShowerGrenadeSupport" or defName="DNX_SonicShockEmitter" or defName="DNX_UplinkSupportConsole" or defName="DNX_Turret_Vanguard20mmSuppressiveCannon" or defName="DNX_VerticalMissileSilo" or defName="DNX_Turret_WatcherLongRangePrecision")]/designationCategory

/Defs/ThingDef[(defName="DNX_Turret_AvengerTwinCannon" or defName="DNX_Turret_Boxer35mmAA" or defName="DNX_Turret_ConvergenceDeathRay" or defName="DNX_Turret_FlatheadRocketTurret" or defName="DNX_Turret_GeminiGatling" or defName="DNX_Turret_GyrfalconM20mmComposite" or defName="DNX_Turret_Hammer120mm" or defName="DNX_HunterKillerSupportSystem" or defName="DNX_Turret_LaserChargeEmitter" or defName="DNX_Turret_LightMachineGun" or defName="DNX_Turret_LightSniper" or defName="DNX_Turret_LittleTrainRGPrototype" or defName="DNX_SustainedLaserEmitter" or defName="DNX_Turret_LongbowM301RocketArtillery" or defName="DNX_Turret_OpenerMLSSixteen" or defName="DNX_Turret_Orchestra40mmChainCannon" or defName="DNX_PrismLaserPointDefenseSystem" or defName="DNX_Turret_SentinelHMGFour" or defName="DNX_Turret_ShieldedSMG" or defName="DNX_Turret_ShowerGrenadeSupport" or defName="DNX_SonicShockEmitter" or defName="DNX_UplinkSupportConsole" or defName="DNX_Turret_Vanguard20mmSuppressiveCannon" or defName="DNX_VerticalMissileSilo" or defName="DNX_Turret_WatcherLongRangePrecision") and not(designationCategory)]
